channel.title: Delphi on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Delphi on Arrans github.io

item.title: salvadordf/CEF4Delphi
item.description: CEF4Delphi is an open source project to embed Chromium-based browsers in applications made with Delphi or Lazarus/FPC for Windows, Linux and MacOS.

item.title: casteng/i-pascal
item.description: A free Object Pascal language plugin for IntelliJ IDEA
